---
title: "Resume"
---

# Professional Experience

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
  <a href="files/Gayashan_Maduwantha_Resume.pdf" download class="download-btn">
    📥 Download Full Resume (PDF)
  </a>
</div>

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="timeline-date">2024</div>
  <h3>Senior UI/UX Engineer</h3>
  <p class="company">JRC Software – Sri Lanka</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Led enterprise platform UI design</li>
    <li>Improved workflow efficiency by 30%</li>
    <li>Conducted usability testing with 50+ users</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="timeline-date">2021 – 2023</div>
  <h3>UI/UX Engineer</h3>
  <p class="company">JRC Software – Sri Lanka</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Managed UX initiatives for B2B platforms</li>
    <li>Reduced user error rates by 35%</li>
    <li>Created scalable design systems</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="timeline-date">2019 – 2020</div>
  <h3>Intern Software Engineer</h3>
  <p class="company">CodeGen International – Sri Lanka</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Assisted R&D software projects</li>
    <li>Built research dashboards for data analysis</li>
    <li>Supported Agile project management</li>
  </ul>
</div>

</div>

---

## Skills Snapshot

<div class="skills-snapshot">
  <span class="skill-tag">UI/UX Design</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">User Research</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Wireframing</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Prototyping</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">React</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Angular</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">JavaScript</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Agile/Scrum</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Figma</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Jira</span>
</div>
